concept: Warning lights. A hood opens. Eyes meet. Truth spoken. Nothing more needed.

shots.frame: ECU: Red warning light glowing on black dashboard
CU: Hood latch releasing, hands in frame
ECU: Two pairs of eyes across the engine bay
CU: Single hand gesture toward the engine
MCU: Two figures, silhouettes against bright shop door

invisibleWide: Everything unnecessary removed. Only the essential exchange remains.

stormCloud.detail: The warning light is the only color in the entire piece.

platform.hook: Single red light on black—immediate visual hook
platform.loop: Yes — minimalism invites repeated viewing to catch details
